title: Enforce CLAUDE.md code quality across CLI, backend, and frontend
description:
## Summary
- Split `endpoints.py` (574 lines) into 4 focused modules: runs/control/agent (263), streaming (160), settings/repos/tokens (158), tunnel (103) — all under the 400-line limit
- Fix all ruff errors in branch files: unused imports, f-strings without placeholders, unused variables
- Extract magic values into constants (Python: `constants.py`, TypeScript: `constants.ts`) — timeouts, limits, tunnel config, polling intervals, breakpoints
- Remove default parameter values and pass constants explicitly at call sites (Python + TypeScript)
- Move inline imports to file top (`import json` in client.py, `import docker` in tunnel module)
- Break 8+ functions exceeding the 20-line limit into focused helpers using dispatch patterns and extraction
- Add missing type annotations (`AsyncSession` params), remove unnecessary `async` on sync functions

## Tests
- `pyright`: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 informations
- `ruff check` on all branch files: all checks passed
- All files under 400-line limit, all functions under 20-line limit
- All 4 routers correctly registered in `app.py` — no duplicate routes
